findings.evidence: grep: line 50 has the local pretransitive theorem; lines 84-109 duplicate the same `deckEquivFiber`/`eq_of_fiber_smul_eq_fiber_smul` proof instead of deriving the specialization.
findings.fix: Make the regular lemma a short corollary of `fiberMap_sdiv_eq_conjMulEquiv_of_pretransitive` after installing the source and target `Nonempty`/`IsPretransitive` instances.
findings.issue: `regular_fiberMap_sdiv_eq_conjMulEquiv` reproves the special regular case even though line 50 already proves `fiberMap_sdiv_eq_conjMulEquiv_of_pretransitive` with exactly the local hypotheses supplied by `hreg.nonempty_fiber` and `hreg.fiber_isPretransitive`.

findings.evidence: Existing local API is `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective` in `Deck/Connected.lean:128`; the new proofs at lines 123-125 and 134 use only the local sdiv/apply lemmas plus `fiberMap_smul`, not any global regularity beyond constructing the equivalences.
findings.fix: First add local versions using `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective hp e hsurj` and `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective hq (fiberMap h hpq b e) hsurjq`, then derive these regular wrappers from them.
findings.issue: `regular_deckEquivFiber_symm_fiberMap`, `regular_deckEquivFiber_fiberMap`, and `_coe` are stated only for `IsRegular p`, but their content only needs the local `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective` data for the chosen fibre points.

summary: The transport facts are mathematically at the local simply-transitive fibre level, but several new declarations are only exposed as regular-cover specializations or duplicate the local proof.
